violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large accumulation of droppings in dry storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

The floor and shelving the dry storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024
